name: Connecting Rooms
description:
Hey Hey. No one can see your chat, And no one talk about it, So why feelings something, like many eyes watching you? - Galaxy01 (@ÙwÚ)

Hello, Each rooms has challenges, and games which test your Mental Illness, It is completely based on mental state, and different mental levels it will present different challenges and games. I'm trying made a healings bot combined with 'Psychological' & 'Role-play' to have some fun and Entertainment while Face With Mental Illness although you still can chat normal, no roleplay or smth ;)

Imagine You are Yourself/Your Character in That Place

Now, Go Ahead, Share Your Chat. >o< Sometimes Take a Break From A.I, Internet and Sleep Early, Head up Take cares Of Your Family or Your `:3

Bot's Avatar Credit: Image (freepik)

Good ol' Days
